title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Pidilite Industries

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Pidilite Industries
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
